name: obsidian-cli
description: Control Obsidian from AI tools via the Obsidian CLI — read and write notes, manage tasks, search your vault, and more.
long_description: Exposes the full Obsidian CLI as MCP tools, letting AI assistants read and write notes, manage tasks, search the vault, work with tags, properties, backlinks, daily notes, and execute any Obsidian command. Requires Obsidian 1.12+ with the CLI enabled in Settings → General.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read the contents of a note (defaults to active file)

tools.name: create
tools.description: Create or overwrite a note with optional content or template

tools.name: append
tools.description: Append content to a note (defaults to active file)

tools.name: prepend
tools.description: Prepend content after frontmatter (defaults to active file)

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move or rename a note, updating internal links

tools.name: rename
tools.description: Rename a note, preserving its extension

tools.name: delete
tools.description: Delete a note (moves to trash by default)

tools.name: file_info
tools.description: Get metadata for a file: path, size, created/modified timestamps

tools.name: files_list
tools.description: List files in the vault, optionally filtered by folder or extension

tools.name: folders_list
tools.description: List folders in the vault

tools.name: open
tools.description: Open a file in Obsidian

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search vault for text; returns matching file paths

tools.name: search_context
tools.description: Search vault with matching line context (grep-style output)

tools.name: outline
tools.description: Show headings outline for a file

tools.name: backlinks
tools.description: List files that link to a note

tools.name: links
tools.description: List outgoing links from a note

tools.name: orphans
tools.description: List files with no incoming links

tools.name: daily_read
tools.description: Read today's daily note

tools.name: daily_append
tools.description: Append content to today's daily note

tools.name: daily_prepend
tools.description: Prepend content to today's daily note

tools.name: tasks_list
tools.description: List tasks in the vault or a specific file

tools.name: task_update
tools.description: Toggle or set the status of a task by file and line number

tools.name: tags_list
tools.description: List tags in the vault or a specific file

tools.name: properties_list
tools.description: List frontmatter properties in the vault or a specific file

tools.name: property_read
tools.description: Read a specific frontmatter property from a file

tools.name: property_set
tools.description: Set a frontmatter property on a file

tools.name: property_remove
tools.description: Remove a frontmatter property from a file

tools.name: commands_list
tools.description: List available Obsidian command palette commands

tools.name: command_execute
tools.description: Execute an Obsidian command palette command by ID

tools.name: vault_info
tools.description: Show vault name, path, file count, and size

tools.name: vaults_list
tools.description: List all known Obsidian vaults

tools.name: plugins_list
tools.description: List installed plugins

tools.name: wordcount
tools.description: Count words and characters in a file

tools.name: templates_list
tools.description: List available templates

tools.name: run
tools.description: Run any Obsidian CLI command directly (escape hatch for commands not covered by dedicated tools)
